svg.title: Mood Dot
svg.desc: A warm-analog sticker in the Prax Journal pack. Textured cream paper with a lavender 5-pixel rail across the top signals neutral observation. A Fraunces serif title "how I'm feeling" anchors the hero, a 10-dot horizontal spectrum lets the user tap a mood on a 1 to 10 scale, and two writing zones capture "one word" and "why".
